headline: Which S&P500 stocks are showing activity after the closing bell on Monday?
summary: As the regular session of the US market on Monday comes to an end, let's delve into the after-hours session and discover the top S&P500 gainers and losers shaping the post-market sentiment.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on Automatic Data Processing, Raises Price Target to $223
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Bryan C. Bergin   maintains Automatic Data Processing (NASDAQ:ADP) with a Hold and raises the price target from $216 to $223.

headline: Automatic Data Processing's Q4 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: Automatic Data Processing is approaching its fourth-quarter earnings release in a few weeks, and Wall Street is forecasting a double-digit percentage rise in earnings.
